overall.description: First-person perspective walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass at night, illuminated by a forward-facing light source. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, depicting an open prairie environment with distant trees visible on the left horizon under a clear dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: nighttime trail through tall grass prairie

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass at night, illuminated by a forward light source

entered.detail: rocky dirt trail extending forward into the distance, illuminated by the light source
tall golden-brown grass lining both sides of the path, swaying slightly
dark silhouette of trees or a tree cluster on the left horizon
clear dark night sky with faint stars visible above the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a dirt path through an open grassland at night. Tall grass flanks both sides of the trail, while distant trees loom on the left horizon against a clear dark sky. The path ahead is illuminated by a warm artificial light source, revealing the rocky texture of the trail as the viewer progresses through the quiet, empty prairie environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate dirt path through a vast, nocturnal prairie. It begins by gliding steadily through open grassland, where tall grass flanks both sides of the trail under a clear dark sky. As the camera progresses, the warm glow of an artificial light source reveals the rugged, rocky texture of the ground immediately ahead. The scene then expands to show distant trees looming on the left horizon before continuing its quiet journey deeper into the empty environment.
